```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    reversed_s = s[::-1]
    lps = [0] * len(reversed_s)
    length = 0

    for i in range(1, len(reversed_s)):
        while length > 0 and reversed_s[i] != reversed_s[length]:
            length = lps[length - 1]
        if reversed_s[i] == reversed_s[length]:
            length += 1
            lps[i] = length
        else:
            lps[i] = 0

    longest_palindromic_suffix_length = lps[-1]
    prefix_to_add = s[:len(s) - longest_palindromic_suffix_length][::-1]
    return s + prefix_to_add

import sys
input_str = sys.stdin.read().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(input_str))
```
